hypothesis: Repeated XR rejection can be reduced if every `sysopt.xr-*` card pins the exact authoritative `source_handoff` from `/work/xr` gap truth, so route-neutral control-plane work cannot keep targeting superseded XR rejection evidence.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `sysopt.xr-*` cards could still verify after `/work/xr` gap truth moved to a different rejecting handoff, as long as `target_route`, `target_gap`, `first_broken_law`, and the current severity baselines still matched, so stale XR control-plane work could keep citing superseded evidence. After the ratchet, every XR card must pin `gap_source_handoff` to `GGD/gaps/routes/work-xr.geometry-gap.json.source_handoff`, and `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` rejects any missing or stale handoff binding while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if the verifier fails XR cards whose `gap_source_handoff` is missing or drifts from `target_gap.source_handoff`, and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: XR systems-optimizer ratchets need an exact handoff-evidence binding; route, law, and severity locks still allow stale control-plane work if the authoritative gap packet is refreshed.
